title: Auth: Hook custom validators (strong_password, e164) into Gin binding engine
Task 13: BrandContext middleware + handlers + routes + main wiring
description: Create internal/brand/middleware/brand_context.go, handler/brand_handler.go, handler/address_handler.go, handler/routes.go. Wire into cmd/api/main.go. Completes UC42-44 brand-side endpoints.

title: Task 12: Brand service + unit tests
description: Create internal/brand/service/brand_service.go and brand_service_test.go. Service uses BrandRepo + AddressRepo to implement brand management business logic.

title: Task 11: BrandAddress PG repo + integration tests
description: Create internal/brand/repo/address_pg.go implementing AddressRepo against Postgres, plus address_pg_test.go integration tests.

title: Task 10: Brand PG repo + integration tests
description: Create internal/brand/repo/brand_pg.go implementing BrandRepo against Postgres, plus brand_pg_test.go integration tests using testfixtures.

title: Task 9: Brand domain + repo interfaces
description: Create internal/brand/domain (brand.go, errors.go, dto.go) and internal/brand/repo/repo.go (BrandRepo, AddressRepo interfaces + ErrNotFound).

title: Task 8: Testfixtures package
description: Create internal/testfixtures/fixtures.go with SeedUser, SeedBrand, SeedCategory, SeedStyleTag, SeedProduct, SeedVariant, SeedImage helpers + BeginTx. Used by every integration test in Phase B+.

title: Task 7: Storage interface + Local backend + GCS stub
description: Create internal/shared/storage package: Storage interface, Object struct, ErrNotImplemented, LocalStorage impl, GCSStorage stub, factory.New(cfg). Add StorageConfig to internal/config/config.go. Foundation for product image uploads.

title: Task 6: Slug helper + custom validator
description: Create internal/shared/slug package (Slugify, IsValid) and register 'slug' custom validator in internal/shared/validator/validator.go. Foundation for brand/product slug fields.
close_reason: Slug helper + validator implemented in commit bb35e2a. All tests pass. Spec compliant, code quality approved after fix loop.

title: Task 5: Seed migrations (taxonomy + dev brands)
description: 000016 seed_taxonomy (10 categories + 10 style_tags, idempotent ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING) and 000017 seed_dev_brands (2 demo users role=brand + 2 brands + 3 addresses, idempotent). Last migration of Phase A. Per plan Task 5.
close_reason: Seed migrations applied. 10 categories, 10 style_tags, 2 brands, 3 addresses. Idempotency confirmed. HEAD c560ce4. Phase A COMPLETE.

title: Task 4: Migrations product_images + product_variants + product_style_tags
description: Three migrations: 000013 product_images (with primary unique partial), 000014 product_variants (size/color/sku unique, FK to images optional), 000015 product_style_tags m2m. Per plan Task 4. Note +1 shift continues: 13-15 instead of 12-14.
close_reason: Three migrations applied: images (CASCADE from products), variants (RESTRICT + CHECK constraints + image SET NULL), style_tags m2m (composite PK). HEAD 4bd6624.

title: Task 3: Migration products + search trigger
description: 000012 products table + product_status enum + search_text trigger (sync from name/description/brand.name) + brand-rename resync trigger + GIN trgm index. Per plan Task 3. NOTE: shift +1 from plan numbering due to pre-existing 000006 on main; use 000012.
close_reason: Products + triggers applied. Trigger smoke test confirmed brand-rename propagates to product search_text. All 7 indexes partial. HEAD 6495d06.

title: Task 2: Migrations categories + style_tags + brand_addresses
description: Three migrations (auto-numbered to 000009, 000010, 000011 given existing 000006 collision shift): categories table with display_order, style_tags lookup table, brand_addresses with partial unique primary index + is_public flag + geo columns. Per plan Task 2.
close_reason: Tables applied. Reviews passed (1 code quality fix: idx_brand_addr_brand_public → partial). HEAD 949bd39.

title: Task 1: Migration 000006 (extensions) + 000007 (brands)
description: Enable pg_trgm + unaccent extensions and create brands table with brand_status enum, unique slug, owner_user_id FK, partial indexes. Includes up + down migrations and migrate-up/down verification. Per plan section Phase A Task 1.
close_reason: Migration 000007 (extensions) + 000008 (brands) applied. Both spec compliance and code quality reviews passed. HEAD 141d69a (amended after code review found 2 important issues — ON DELETE RESTRICT and partial idx_brands_status, both fixed).

title: Sprint 1 — Catalog & Brand Product Management
description: Epic covering 25 tasks in docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-16-sprint-1-catalog-and-brand-product-management.md. Implements UC10-13, UC42-44, UC51 (partial) per the spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-16-catalog-and-brand-product-management-design.md.

title: Auth: End-to-end curl tests (skip Google/iOS)
description: Verify all SRS UC03-09 + UC41/52 flows work end-to-end against live postgres+redis
close_reason: All flows tested end-to-end except Google/Apple (deferred) and Twilio SMS (no credentials). 2 bugs found and fixed in separate commit.

title: Auth: Remove Facebook Sign-In; defer Google/Apple setup
description: User can't set up Google/Apple yet (will configure later). Facebook removed entirely from code, config, migration enum, and docs.

title: Auth: Accept multiple OAuth Client IDs (Google web+iOS, Apple App ID + Services ID)
description: Frontend has 3 platforms (web/iOS/Android) so backend must accept multiple aud values. Google: web+iOS Client IDs. Apple: App ID (iOS native) + Services ID (web/Android via web flow).

Auth: Implement Apple Sign-In identity token verification (JWKs)
Auth: Wire DI in cmd/api/main.go

Auth: Handlers + routes for all UC03-09 + social + brand/admin login
Auth: Services (auth, token, password, otp, social, profile)
Auth: Repos (user, session, otp, login_attempt)
Auth: Domain entities, DTOs, errors, role enum
Auth: Shared utilities (hash, jwt, postgres, redis, mailer, sms, httpx)
